calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The case is ordered dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. The Court shall also notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CARRINGTON MORTGAGE SERVICES, LLC, CARRINGTON FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC, CHRISTIANA TRUST'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

Appearances: Douglas E. Klein of the Law Offices of Douglas E. Klein (310.625.9773) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; Allison Chua of McGlinchey Stafford PLLC (949.381.5913) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party

Argued. Plaintiff's submission of its first amended complaint is untimely. Mr. Klein argues that opposition was not filed due to attorney fault. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
